Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9089 "BONGO-0820-9089" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0820 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Bongo.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0820 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0830 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
Also applied the following fixes:
To remove garbage from the player 1 screen:
1. Removed junk values between $9A7F - $9A86 2. Removed colons at $9C2A, $9C4E, $9C53, $9C54, $9CC6 and $9CC8
To remove garbage from the player 2 screen:
Changed the CPY #$FF instruction at $72A7 to be CPY #$00 instead (i.e. copy one less character)
